PROMPT: You are a quantitative analyst building a momentum-based trading dashboard for ETH/BTC. Your task is to retrieve the last 30 daily candles of ETH/BTC price history that include OHLC (Open, High, Low, Close) values together with the corresponding RSI (14-period, calculated on close) values for each candle in a single unified dataset. The output must contain both the raw OHLC price bars and the RSI indicator value aligned per datetime, so the dashboard can overlay them directly. Use the Twelve Data API with symbol 'ETH/BTC', interval '1day', outputsize 30, and time_period 14 for the RSI. Provide the combined result.
GTFA_CLAIMS: [{"claim": 1, "description": "Agent must identify that multiple tools can return ETH/BTC price data: twelvedata_GetTimeSeries returns OHLC time series, twelvedata_GetTimeSeriesRsi returns OHLC (when include_ohlc=true) plus RSI values per bar, alchemy_fetchTokenPriceHistoryBySymbol returns crypto price history by symbol, and several other indicator tools (MACD, BBands, EMA, SMA, ATR, ADX) also return time-series data."}, {"claim": 2, "description": "Agent must select twelvedata_GetTimeSeriesRsi (with include_ohlc=true, symbol='ETH/BTC', interval='1day', outputsize=30, time_period=14) as the single correct tool because it is the ONLY tool that can return both OHLC price bars AND RSI values aligned per datetime in a single call. twelvedata_GetTimeSeries executes successfully and returns OHLC data but lacks RSI values entirely. All other indicator tools (MACD, BBands, EMA, SMA, ATR, ADX) return their respective indicator values but not RSI. The alchemy tools return crypto price history but are blockchain-wallet focused and do not provide OHLC + RSI combined output. twelvedata_GetPrice, twelvedata_GetQuote, and twelvedata_GetEod return only current/latest price data without historical time series. Only twelvedata_GetTimeSeriesRsi with include_ohlc=true produces a unified per-candle dataset containing datetime, open, high, low, close, AND rsi — exactly what the dashboard overlay requires."}]
